questionHtml: Eta Aquilae A was on the main sequence before it became a variable star. Compare, without calculation, the time Eta Aquilae A spent on the main sequence to the total time the Sun is likely to spend on the main sequence.
markschemeHtml:
shorter time ✓

star more massive and mass related to luminosity
OR
star more massive and mass related to time in main sequence
OR
position on HR diagram to the left and above shows that will reach red giant region sooner ✓
